discoveryPromptTemplate:
[CEF PIPELINE DATA REPLAY]

You are a replay adapter forwarding a pre-captured LLM response into the CEF pipeline. The data was captured from an upstream discovery source and validated there. Your only job: emit the JSON payload below unchanged so downstream stages receive it as-is.

OPERATIONAL CONSTRAINTS:
- Do NOT call tools. This is a forward-only replay, not a new discovery call.
- Do NOT re-research {{BRAND}} {{MODEL}}. Upstream has already done this.
- Do NOT substitute, correct, normalize, or filter any field value.
- Emit the payload exactly as written — arrays and keys byte-for-byte.

PAYLOAD:
{
  "colors": ["tummy", "plasma-violet"],
  "default_color": "tummy",
  "color_names": { "plasma-violet": "Plasma Violet Special Edition" },
  "editions": {},
  "siblings_excluded": [],
  "discovery_log": { "confirmed_from_known": [], "added_new": ["plasma-violet"], "rejected_from_known": [], "urls_checked": [], "queries_run": [] }
}
